title: Workflow Status v1
description: Runtime status of a dispatched workflow instance. Tracks overall workflow state, current phase, and per-phase progress including agent assignment and timestamps. Producer: canopy, dispatch engine. Consumer: cap, monitoring systems, operators.

handoff_path.description: Path to the handoff markdown file that initiated this workflow.

template_id.description: Reference to the workflow template used for this instance.

current_phase.description: ID of the currently active phase, or null if no phase has started yet.

phase_id.description: Phase identifier from the workflow template.

agent_id.description: Assigned agent ID (e.g., 'impl/repo/handoff/1') or null if not yet assigned.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this phase started, or null if not started.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this phase completed, or null if not completed.

canopy_task_id.description: Canopy task ID (ULID) tracking this phase, or null if not yet created.

phases.description: Array of phase statuses in workflow order.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this workflow was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last status update.
